patch.value: Export --apply aborts the whole batch on the first failed item

The exporter's --apply loop did 'await request(...)' per item with no try/catch. A single failed create/update (e.g. a 422 for a label that does not exist on the repo) threw and abandoned every remaining item, with no record of what was already written. The import/sync paths already isolate per-item failures (skipped++/continue); the export path did not.
per-item apply failures isolated and counted; batch completes with a summary; happy path + dry-run byte-identical; unit test proves continue-on-failure

author: claude

patch.value: Verified shipped: applyExportPlan isolates per-item failures (try/catch, failures[], continue). Tests: 'continues after a per-item failure', 'never throws on a failing item'. Code index.ts:1054-1139.
